page_content:
Prerequisite: BMGT343 and BMGT347.

BMGT443 Applied Equity Analysis and Portfolio Management (3 Credits) Study and application of the concepts, methods, models, and empirical findings to the analysis, valuation and selection of securities, especially common stock.

Prerequisite: BMGT343.

BMGT444 Futures and Options Contracts (3 Credits)

The institutional features and economic rationale underlying markets in futures and options. Hedging, speculation, structure of futures prices, interest rate futures, efficiency in futures markets and stock and commodity options.
